I am going to give you data from 1 or 2 APIs about a property. And I am going to give you two schemas for project and borrower resumes. Goal is to fill maximum fields of the resumes using the data we got from the APIs. I want you to go through every field in the schema and try to assign a value to it from the available data. We need maximum values possible. Ignore the required thing. That shouldn't affect anything. We need values for all fields. If a field is available from both the APIs, tell me about it

Let's do this thoroughly. Return all the fields and values you can assign to in both the resumes
